subpageCard.description: Shared subpage/card surface tokens. Canonical defaults live in tokens.css, theme overrides live in theme/*.css, and scoped shared primitive overrides live in documented shared/mobile primitive files. Feature direct definitions are migration candidates and should normally move to feature-prefixed alias tokens before mapping back to --subpage-card-* at the feature shell.

btnPrimary.description: Primary action button tokens. Canonical defaults live in tokens.css, global theme variants live in theme/*.css, shared primitives may bridge these tokens in documented shared UI files, and feature-specific button visuals should move through feature-prefixed alias tokens before mapping back to --btn-primary-* inside the feature shell.
